mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.writer_id, u.name AS writer_name, u.username AS writer_username, c.created_at, c.deleted FROM board_comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.writer_id = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY c.created_at ASC

SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.writer_id, u.name AS writer_name, u.username AS writer_username, c.created_at, c.deleted FROM board_comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.writer_id = u.id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC

SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.writer_id, u.name AS writer_name, u.username AS writer_username, c.created_at, c.deleted FROM board_comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.writer_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_comment ( post_id, parent_id, content, writer_id, created_at, deleted ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{parentId}, #{content}, #{writerId}, NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE board_comment SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND deleted = 0
